# Jain Tours & Travels

> Mumbai-based travel agency curating premium domestic and international holiday packages since 2008. 4.9★ on Google with 142+ reviews.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Curated luxury journeys from Mumbai.
- [Destinations](/destinations): Domestic and international holiday destinations.
- [Services](/services): Flights, visas, cruises, insurance, and corporate travel.
- [Reviews](/reviews): Guest reviews and testimonials.
- [About](/about): Our story, philosophy, and team.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email, and Mumbai office address.

## Featured destinations

- [Kerala](/destinations/kerala): Backwaters, houseboats, and tea estates.
- [Kashmir](/destinations/kashmir): Dal Lake houseboats and Gulmarg snow.
- [Rajasthan](/destinations/rajasthan): Forts, palaces, and desert camps.
- [Maldives](/destinations/maldives): Overwater villas and reef snorkelling.
- [Dubai](/destinations/dubai): City breaks, desert safaris, luxury stays.
- [Europe](/destinations/europe): Multi-country curated itineraries.
